meta.title: Mullai Periyar Single-Crop Irrigation Farmers Association
meta.description: A united voice protecting the rights of farmers in southern Tamil Nadu who depend on Periyar river water.

hero.title: Soil and water are
hero.description: Mullai Periyar Single-Crop Irrigation Farmers Association — a united voice protecting the rights of farmers in southern Tamil Nadu who depend on Periyar river water.

about.title: About the association
about.body: The Mullai Periyar Single-Crop Irrigation Farmers Association is a collective of farmers in southern Tamil Nadu who depend on the Periyar dam for single-crop irrigation. We continue to raise our voice to ensure water is released on schedule and the reservoir is maintained at its full level.
about.quoteLead: Water is not a favour granted to us —
about.quoteEn: Water is not a favour granted to us — it is our birthright.

leaders.title: Leadership
leaders.presidentQuoteLead: Periyar water is the fruit of our ancestors' labour. To pass that water, with its full rights, to the
leaders.presidentBio: As the voice of farmers across five districts from Theni to Ramanathapuram, we relentlessly bring the water level demand and dam safety to the government's attention.

demands.title: Our demands
demands.description: Key demands to secure the livelihood of farmers in the Periyar command area.

issue.title: The Mullai Periyar issue
issue.body: Water from the west-flowing Periyar river is diverted through the Mullai Periyar dam, built in 1895, to five drought-prone districts in southern Tamil Nadu. But the long-standing dispute over the dam's water level has affected irrigation in this region year after year.

farmers.title: Voices of our farmers
farmers.description: The lives and prosperity of thousands of single-crop farmers in the command area depend on this water. In their words —

news.pageDescription: Latest news, announcements, and events from the association.

join.title: Join the association
join.body: Let us unite as a single voice for farmers in the Periyar command area. Register your details and our volunteers will contact you.
join.successBody: Your registration has been received. Our volunteers will contact you soon.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: For demands, membership, or event information — contact the association office.

objectives.title: Water Rights
objectives.body: Legally protect the water rights of farmers in the Periyar command area.

objectives.title: Dam Safety
objectives.body: Continuously monitor and ensure the dam's structural safety.

objectives.title: Livelihood
objectives.body: Protect the crops, income, and livelihood of single-crop farmers.

demands.text: Raise the Mullai Periyar dam water level to the full 152 feet.
demands.textSecondary: முல்லைப் பெரியாறு அணையின் நீர்மட்டம் 152 அடியாக உயர்த்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

demands.text: Release irrigation water on time, as per cultivation needs.
demands.textSecondary: பாசனத் தேவைக்கேற்ப தண்ணீர் காலத்தோடு திறந்துவிடப்பட வேண்டும்.

demands.text: Legally protect the water rights of farmers in the command area.
demands.textSecondary: பெரியாறு பாசனப் பகுதி விவசாயிகளின் நீர் உரிமை சட்டப்படி பாதுகாக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

demands.text: Continuously monitor and ensure the dam's structural safety.
demands.textSecondary: அணையின் கட்டமைப்புப் பாதுகாப்பு தொடர்ந்து கண்காணிக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

demands.text: Provide fair compensation and crop insurance to single-crop farmers.
demands.textSecondary: ஒருபோக விவசாயிகளுக்கு உரிய நஷ்டஈடு மற்றும் பயிர்க் காப்பீடு வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

timeline.text: Mullai Periyar dam completed under John Pennycuick.
timeline.textSecondary: ஜான் பென்னிகுயிக் தலைமையில் முல்லைப் பெரியாறு அணை கட்டி முடிக்கப்பட்டது.

timeline.text: 999-year lease agreement — west-flowing Periyar water diverted eastward.
timeline.textSecondary: 999 ஆண்டு குத்தகை ஒப்பந்தம் — மேற்கு நோக்கி ஓடிய பெரியாறு நீர் கிழக்கே திருப்பப்பட்டது.

timeline.text: Supreme Court permits raising the level from 142 ft to 152 ft.
timeline.textSecondary: உச்ச நீதிமன்றம் நீர்மட்டத்தை 142 அடியிலிருந்து 152 அடியாக உயர்த்த அனுமதித்தது.

timeline.text: The association presses for the full 152 ft level and timely water release.
timeline.textSecondary: 152 அடி முழு நீர்மட்டத்தையும் காலத்தோடு நீர் திறப்பையும் சங்கம் வலியுறுத்துகிறது.

farmers.name: Karuppasamy
farmers.quote: Our paddy crop succeeds only when Periyar water arrives on time. The association stands as our voice.

farmers.name: Lakshmi
farmers.quote: We lost crops in years when the water level dropped. The 152 ft demand is a livelihood demand.

farmers.name: Muthuraman
farmers.quote: We have lived on this water for generations. We have united to protect our rights.

faqs.q: Is there a fee to join?
faqs.a: No. All farmers in the single-crop command area can join for free.

faqs.q: Why is the 152 ft water level important?
faqs.a: Only at full level can the irrigation needs of all five districts be fully met.

faqs.q: Where can I find new updates?
faqs.a: The association publishes weekly announcements in the News and Videos sections.

contacts.label: Address
contacts.value: Association office, Theni district, Tamil Nadu

news.title: Mass rally in Theni demanding full water level
paragraphs: Thousands of farmers participated in this rally demanding that the Mullai Periyar dam water level be raised to the full 152 feet.
Farmer representatives from Theni, Madurai, Sivaganga, Ramanathapuram, and Dindigul participated. Five key demands were submitted to the district administration.
Farmers highlighted crop losses from the previous season due to delayed water release. They warned that protests would intensify if timely action is not taken.

news.title: Five-district farmer coordination meeting
paragraphs: Representatives from five districts met to plan for the upcoming irrigation season.
Decisions were made on water sharing, scheduling, and emergency needs. Coordination committees will be formed in each district.

news.title: New member registration camp — all village panchayats
paragraphs: All farmers in the single-crop command area can register as members for free.
Visit the camp at your panchayat office or fill the membership form on this website. Members will receive event updates in advance.

footer.description: A united voice for the rights of farmers in the Periyar command area. Water, soil, livelihood — our right.
footer.tagline: Water is our right · நீர் நம் உரிமை
